blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,658 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 59".
